name: dvv_split_pair_type
definition: Split dv/v by pair type (CC/SC/AC) separately. CC=inter-station; SC=same station different location; AC=autocorrelation.

name: dvv_split_components
definition: Split dv/v by component pair (ZZ/RR/TT/etc) separately.

name: dvv_cc_value
definition: dv/v column to use for CC (inter-station) pairs. m=free-intercept slope; m0=forced-through-zero slope.

name: dvv_cc_error
definition: Error column for CC pairs. Must match dvv_cc_value: em for m; em0 for m0.

name: dvv_sc_value
definition: dv/v column for SC (single-station different location) pairs. m0 recommended: no clock error expected.

name: dvv_ac_value
definition: dv/v column for AC (autocorrelation) pairs. m0 recommended: no clock error expected.

name: dvv_quality_min
definition: Minimum mean coherence (mcoh) to include a pair at a given time step. Set to 0 to disable.

name: dvv_trimmed_mean
definition: Compute trimmed mean: reject pairs whose dv/v deviates more than dvv_trim_limit sigma from the mean.

name: dvv_percentiles
definition: Comma-separated list of percentiles to save (e.g. 5,25,75,95).

name: dvv_output_percent
definition: Output dv/v in percent (multiply slope by 100). If N output as fraction.
